methods.description: Process for enhancing the findability of paleoclimate data using geographic map-based searches and a web service with API and GUI capabilities.

steps.description: WDS-Paleo makes its data findable via geographic map-based searches, along with a web service featuring an application programming interface (API) for programmatic use and a graphical user interface (GUI) that also acts as an API-builder tool.
steps.searchable_summary: Implement geographic map-based searches and API/GUI for data access

steps.description: Recently a new controlled vocabulary, Paleoenvironmental Standard Terms (PaST), has been developed for documenting variables.
steps.searchable_summary: Develop and apply controlled vocabulary for data documentation

steps.description: With the input of 25 subject-matter experts, terms have been assigned to over 100,000 paleoclimatic time series, powering new search capabilities.
steps.searchable_summary: Assign controlled vocabulary terms to paleoclimatic time series

methods.description: Method for maintaining provenance of data and metadata through the use of data bundles that include data files and manifest information.

steps.description: A bundle includes data files and manifest information, maintaining provenance of both data and metadata.
steps.searchable_summary: Create data bundles with files and manifest for provenance

methods.description: Process for promoting interoperability of data and metadata formats through machine readability and common tools.

steps.description: Upcoming and long-standing data and metadata formats promote interoperability via machine readability and common tools.
A NOAA Standard for the Linked Paleo Data Format (LiPD) is designed to facilitate interoperability between LiPD and the NOAA WDS-Paleo Template data format, including use of PaST terms.
steps.searchable_summary: Facilitate interoperability between LiPD and NOAA WDS-Paleo Template

steps.description: Standardized metadata formats, including DIF, ISO, and JSON, facilitate data discovery and federated search capabilities.
steps.searchable_summary: Use standardized metadata formats for data discovery
